metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2070
metadata.comment:
Rationale: PORCN controls assembly and stability of hippocampal AMPARs at the level of the ER.

shRNA-knockdown of PORCN in hippocampal neurons significantly reduced AMPAR-mediated currents (>50%, Figure 3A-B) and surface and total AMPAR levels (Figure 5A-C). Function of PORCN is independent of catalytic activity (Figure S3B).

AMPAR complex components are reduced in extrasynaptic and synaptic fractions purified from PORCN KO forebrain tissue (Figure 6B-D).

"PORCN knockout reduces basal synaptic transmission but not long-term potentiation" Figure 7

KO PORCN reduces Endo-H-sensitive and resistant pools of AMPARs in hippocampal neurons (TARPs and CNIH only effect EndoH-resistant, Supplemental Figure 5).

18/01/2018 Pim
- In figures 7 it is shown that the amount of AMPARs in the PSD is reduced. The term 'regulation of neurotransmitter receptor localization to postsynaptic specialization membrane (GO:0098696)' was not awarded because in figure 6 it is shown that "PORCN knockout reduces synaptic and extrasynaptic AMPAR complexes". The effect on AMPAR levels in the PSD is downstream of the number of AMPARs in the membrane.. Experimental description: Hippocampal cultures for shRNA: Primary cultures of rat hippocampal neurons... E18 Sprague Dawley rat embryos...

PORCN KO mice: from text in paper "To investigate further the role of PORCN in brain, we crossed Emx1(Cre) with conditional PORCN knockout mice (Liu et al.,2012) to generate forebrain-specific inducible PORCN knockout mice (PORCN KO), which are viable and without obvious behavioral phenotype though complete PORCN knockout mice die during embryonic development (Barrott et al., 2011). Using hippocampi from these mice..."

Hippocampal cultures for electrophysiology: Spontaneous AMPAR-mediated miniature excitatory post-synaptic currents (mEPSC) from hippocampal neurons (days in vitro [DIV] 20-26)...

Slice preparation: Transverse hippocampal slices were prepared from mice aged 17 - 30 days...Schaeffer collaterals were stimulated at 0.1 Hz
